findings.description: The `ignore-blank-lines` directive is defined in the Variable format directive table in the source but is absent from s3 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source lists `ignore-blank-lines ``任意``` as a Variable-format directive with description and default behavior.

findings.description: Section s3 covers the entire `ディレクティブ宣言部の定義` h2, which contains 5 h3 subsections (共通, Fixed, Variable, JSON, XML) and is well over 2000 chars of plain text. The h3 boundaries were not used as split points, resulting in a single very large section.
findings.source_evidence: RST h2 `ディレクティブ宣言部の定義` has 5 h3 children: 共通で使用可能なディレクティブ一覧, Fixed(固定長)形式で指定可能なディレクティブ一覧, Variable(可変長)形式で指定可能なディレクティブ一覧, JSON形式で指定可能なディレクティブ一覧, XML形式で指定可能なディレクティブ一覧.
